reviews.review_description: FreePlay free play free play. We need free play so we can play against other bosses but otherwise the game is OK. I mean it would be cool if you were like so knockdowns like maybe like a little cut scene or something that would be kind of cool, but like I think I don’t think I’d expect them that much so but it was pretty decent game. It’s just so grinding and you have to do the training. I think you should be able to skip the training that would be way better.

Please add seated game play 
Not everyone can or wants to constantly stand 
I’ve wanted to play this ever since I bought it 
But I work 10 hours a day
I’m tired when I get home 
Thanks for listening and I really want to slap some fools 🤣

So a long time ago when this game released for a week before it released, I pre-ordered it and I was so excited to play it so it came out. You know I got on my headset and started playing, and it really wasn’t what I thought Janky mechanics a tutorial that really doesn’t understand or react to your punches and stuff because I was punching the right way it wanted me to and it said I didn’t do it correctly and I wanted to do some multiplayer but there’s hardly anybody online but that’s not really anything I can control but like maybe just random public lobbies like a roll attack where you just spawn in and there’s a bunch of other players like that so yeah, just giving you a warning

reviews.review_title: This game is underdeveloped for price
reviews.review_description:
I’d like to think im fairly opened minded when it comes to different gaming experience but this one i just couldnt vibe with. 

I wasted minutes fighting the “main boss” in the introduction just to fight out after finally dying that i was never meant to win! 🤨

$24.99 price tag and no voice actors?! Ive played many games, a quarter of the price, that had some pretty good voice acting. In the absense if a void actor, i would have made exception if the stript was great.  But the texts from character you’re playing as, “the invincible”, was anything but crude and kindof cringey.

Sometimes, i’d also randomly lose a round from taking one hit! 😑 

Furthermore, the visual quality, particularly the element energy casts, seem very subpar in comparison to a host of other games around the same price tag. 

The jumping in mid air and being able to slap seems pretty nifty but besides that, and slap combos, the physical fighting is pretty basic.. 

Unfortunately not my cup of tea but hopefully someone else can enjoy this.

Watched this grow from a wild concept into a full game. 
It’s not perfect but you did it, and it’s honestly fun as hell. 🥳😈
Respect. 🫡

developer_response.body:
Much respect right back at you! 🫡
It means the world to hear that from someone who’s seen it grow from day one.
No game is perfect, but we aimed for fun, chaos, and heart — and we’re glad it shows.
Thanks for being part of the journey! 🙌💥

– Team Curious Games 🥊

reviews.review_description:
Absolutely awesome game, love the power elements in this gives off a great vibe of Street Fighter. 

The graphics in this could do with a tweak to make them slightly sharper, but quest games Optimizer takes care of that for now. 

The single player story mode is awesome, with some great little side quests. 

Love the artwork in the game it’s like a comic book coming to life! 

Great job well done devs! Bravo 👏

The controls feel buggy, particularly selecting and throwing elements. Many times it just doesn't work. The tutorials the game forces you to do are genuinely awful, needlessly difficult bc they dont explain what you need to do and are buggy as hell. Particularly the elemental ones. Put clear instructions, leave the instructions on the screen and make them less difficult. It should be learning basics not a boss fight.

Awesome game, but I can’t play it for hours in one go — it gets a bit repetitive after a while. That said, for 20–30 minute bursts, it’s a blast. I’ll definitely keep it installed and come back to it when I want quick, satisfying fun.

There is a story mode and a multi-player fight mode.  Its stand up only and uses your real height so hopefully this will prevent being bombarded by annoying 5 year olds like most  games.  I just started and am excited to play a great game while getting a good workout.

Love the art style in the game… like a bright, neon cartoon look to it… comic book style.

You go through a tutorial, before taking on each of the 10 Slap Syndicate mini bosses, working your way up to the big boss!

You learn how to slap, block and use elements to defeat your enemies.
Each enemy you defeat, you take a new element from, to help you use against the next enemies.
Also defeating each enemy, you get to equip their gloves as a cosmetic for your character.

The fights take place in circle arenas, where you throw slaps, combo slaps, dodge, block and throw the elements you learn at your opponent.

There is also a multiplayer arena, if you fancy slapping silly some real human opponents! 

The sounds are decent and it has a very interesting story to follow too, which is also recorded down in a book at your base.

It gives a good work out… well it worked up a sweat in me lol
Just try it! It's an amazing game, and I'm truly looking forward how this game grows! Greetings from the Netherlands.

I seriously have no complaints about this game. Everything from the Characters + Combat System and even the Story are all very well thought out and entertaining… I would recommend adding this to your library.
I got to cosplay Will Smith for a little bit. Cool gameplay and I vibe with the graphics.

This is an early impression review as only been out a few hours.
Love games with a story and it’s rare to get a story with a fighting game.
Has a great feel to it, slapping is very satisfying, tutorial was easy to follow, I already hate my opponents and want revenge on the slap syndicate, I’m coming for you all.
Well done to Curious Games, it’s definitely has a lot of potential and a lot of fun.
A must buy.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the awesome early impressions! 🙌
We’re so glad you’re enjoying the story — weaving narrative into a fighting game was a big part of our vision, and it’s great to see it land.
Can’t wait to see you take down the entire Slap Syndicate! 💥
Thanks for the support and kind words — it means the world to the whole Curious Games team! 🥊

reviews.review_description: Slap Fighter is pure fun and has a story you can follow and progress with or drop straight in and slap your friends. The physics are great, the graphics a cartoony but it suits the game play.  I have only dropped in enough to complete the tutorial which was a workout in itself.  I think where this will excel is slapping strangers and even better when slapping your friends. Quick to pick up, endlessly entertaining, and guaranteed to make you laugh remember Slap responsibly, oh and watch your play area!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words and awesome first impressions! 🙌
We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the physics, the humor, and that the tutorial already gave you a workout 😄
Can’t wait for you to dive deeper into the campaign and start slapping friends (and strangers) responsibly! 💥

– Team Curious Games 🥊

reviews.review_description: The combat dynamics in this game are a masterpiece, utilizing realistic ragdoll physics that make every single blow feel powerful and satisfying. With graphics straight out of a comic book and a highly atmospheric soundtrack, you are transported directly into the middle of the action for a truly immersive experience where fighting is less a sequence of moves and more a cinematic show.
Just a great game in general can't wait to see what else they have in store only thing is some of the game isn't working

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 4/5 and the kind words! 🙌
We’re really happy you’re enjoying the game — and we’ve got plenty more in the works! 😊
If you have a moment, hop on our Discord and share what’s not working for you — every piece of feedback helps us make the game better, and we truly take it to heart.
– Team Curious Games 🥊

reviews.review_description:
OMG THIS GAME SLAPSSSS
🔥🔥🔥 best vr fight everrrrr. Cool gameplay and crazy graphics!

developer_response.body:
Hahaha YESSS! 😄💥
We’re so glad you’re feeling the hype — that’s exactly the energy we were going for!
Thanks for the love and for slapping responsibly (or not 😈).

Stay tuned... there’s more madness to come! 🔥🔥🔥
– Team Curious Games 🥊
